title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **Rebirth**
*2024*
Rebuild old lands in a lush, hopeful future.
![Rebirth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_ed25bce3.png)

2. **JinxO**
*2024*
Jinx your friend to become victorious.
![JinxO](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_93537427.jpg)

3. **The Resort**
*2027*
Manage a resort in paradise while making your guests happy.
![The Resort](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_49bc0606.jpg)

4. **Tigris & Euphrates**
*1997*
Keep your Mesopotamian civilization in perfect balance through revolutions and wars.
![Tigris & Euphrates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_7a58b9db.png)

5. **Magical Athlete**
*2025*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_399fc3b4.png)

6. **Kingdom Come: Deliverance – The Board Game**
*2026*
Develop your character, fulfill quests, and shape history in 15th-century Bohemia.
![Kingdom Come: Deliverance – The Board Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_5ffb543b.png)

7. **Mooki Island**
*2025*
Befriend adorable Mookies, but watch out for the Spider!
![Mooki Island](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_8973640d.jpg)

8. **Wingspan Pocket**
*2026*
Swiftly build and activate a row of colorful birds.
![Wingspan Pocket](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_90f4503f.jpg)

9. **Wondrous Creatures**
*2024*
Build the best reserve in the world for 100+ fantastic creatures!
![Wondrous Creatures](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_c51a28b8.jpg)

10. **Container**
*2026*
Set prices as you produce, sell, and ship containers in a tight economic simulation.
![Container](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_b108f799.jpg)

11. **World Order**
*2026*
Simulate the modern global political system in this area-majority game.
![World Order](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_8a4c8707.jpg)

12. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_690d4190.png)

13. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_0df0bf30.jpg)

14. **Galileo's Truth**
*2026*
Follow the steps of Galileo Galilei in this Euro-Style competitive game.
![Galileo's Truth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_7fd43535.png)

15. **Ringyō**
*2026*
A simultaneous worker placement game about sustainable forestry in feudal Japan.
![Ringyō](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_a7a14255.png)

16. **The Old King's Crown**
*2025*
Out-manoeuvre your rivals as you vie for control of an ancient, crumbling kingdom.
![The Old King's Crown](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_6256d3c7.jpg)

17. **Moon Colony Bloodbath**
*2025*
Whatever can go wrong will go wrong. Players compete to keep their colonists alive.
![Moon Colony Bloodbath](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_a18b2196.jpg)

18. **Harmonies**
*2024*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_3437c04a.jpg)

19. **Wroth**
*2025*
Factions vie for control over the island of Wroth.
![Wroth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_eba6ada4.jpg)

20. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_b26316b5.jpg)

21. **Spirit Island**
*2017*
Island Spirits join forces using elemental powers to defend their home from invaders.
![Spirit Island](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_fe9b13c8.jpg)

22. **Siege Perilous**
*2026*
Adventure through Arthur's Britain in pursuit of glory and renown.
![Siege Perilous](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_8466bcd8.jpg)

23. **dnup**
*2025*
Flip cards to get the right numbers and ditch your cards.
![dnup](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_949f23eb.jpg)

24. **Nippon: Zaibatsu**
*2026*
Control conglomerates of companies driving Japan’s economy.
![Nippon: Zaibatsu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_03057434.jpg)

25. **Entropy**
*2026*
Create stars, form planets, and guide life from microbes to animals.
![Entropy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_da117a03.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*18 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_1635ad19.jpg)

2. **Harmonies**
*26 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_8a772fc7.jpg)

3. **Castle Combo**
*21 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_4f3f3998.jpg)

4. **Ark Nova**
*54 months on the list*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_7c180724.jpg)

5. **Wingspan**
*90 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_c135ba57.jpg)

6. **Azul**
*104 months on the list*
Artfully embellish the walls of your palace by drafting the most beautiful tiles.
![Azul](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_bf1611ed.png)

7. **Bomb Busters**
*14 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_2ae894fe.png)

8. **Terraforming Mars**
*117 months on the list*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_b2c8d942.jpg)

9. **Sea Salt & Paper**
*36 months on the list*
A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!
![Sea Salt & Paper](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_fda45d29.jpg)

10. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*43 months on the list*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_22e673fd.jpg)

11. **Faraway**
*26 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_991b4182.png)

12. **Forest Shuffle**
*33 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_990e975f.jpg)

13. **Cascadia**
*59 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_99a878de.jpg)

14. **dnup**
*1 months on the list*
Flip cards to get the right numbers and ditch your cards.
![dnup](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_a0971545.jpg)

15. **Sky Team**
*33 months on the list*
Work together silently to land a plane under increasingly challenging circumstances.
![Sky Team](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_134b2bdb.jpg)

16. **Moon Colony Bloodbath**
*2 months on the list*
Whatever can go wrong will go wrong. Players compete to keep their colonists alive.
![Moon Colony Bloodbath](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_cb5b5dd0.jpg)

17. **Hot Streak**
*5 months on the list*

![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_c94cf983.jpg)

18. **The Gang**
*12 months on the list*

![The Gang](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_5fceadb0.jpg)

19. **Magical Athlete**
*5 months on the list*

![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-16/toplist/bgg_02c47c3b.png)

21. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**

Build the best reserve in the world for 100+ fantastic creatures!

*276 months on the list*
